pages.title: Tier 1 Structure
pages.text: The Alien Pyramid is a powerful multiblock structure that generates entropy continuously. Tier 1 is the foundation of all energy production.$(br)$()Structure:$(br)- Layer 0: 5x5 Sandstone$(br)- Layer 1: 3x3 Gold Blocks (centered)$(br)- Layer 2: Pyramid Core at center

pages.title: Pyramid Core
pages.text: The heart of the pyramid. Place at the top center of the structure.

pages.title: Alien Pyramid Casing
pages.text: Used to build the outer layers of higher tier pyramids.

pages.title: Ancient Ankh
pages.text: CRITICAL: Craft this BEFORE activating your pyramid! Sneak + Right-click the Pyramid Core to activate it. Requires 25 Entropy Biomass inside the core.

pages.title: Activation & Generation
pages.text: Activation: Sneak + Right-click with Ancient Ankh$(br)Cost: 25 Entropy Biomass$(br)Duration: 10 minutes$(br)$()Generation (Tier 1):$(br)- Base: 2 Entropy per tick$(br)- Max Buffer: 500 Entropy$(br)$()If connected to a reservoir, entropy is pushed automatically.
